title: Breeze Rod Recipes
description: Now craft your own breeze rods
body:
🌬️ Breeze Rod Recipe Datapack  
Craft the storm’s spear—no trial chambers required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for the Breeze Rod, letting players access this new utility item without battling the Breeze mob.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Stick + 1 Wind Charge 
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with trial chamber and projectile progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
